governing_principle: Content source files are contracts, not final copy. No source file may cause public output unless the corresponding route has status 'published' in data/routes.json.
publication_rule: No source_status may cause public output unless the corresponding route status in data/routes.json is exactly 'published'.
build_gate: approved_for_build requires route status 'published' in data/routes.json before any HTML is generated.

field_definitions.route: The path this content source governs. Must match an entry in data/routes.json.
field_definitions.source_status: Current editorial workflow state. See allowed_source_status.
field_definitions.page_role: The strategic role of this page. Must match the role in data/routes.json.
field_definitions.ux_layer: The UX layer this page primarily addresses. Must match data/routes.json.
field_definitions.claim_level: The dominant claim classification for content on this page. See data/claim-types.json.
field_definitions.monetization_allowed: Whether monetization elements are permitted. Must match data/routes.json.
field_definitions.title: The intended SEO title for the page.
field_definitions.h1: The intended H1 heading. May differ from title.
field_definitions.canonical_intent: A brief statement of the page's canonical strategic purpose.
field_definitions.summary: A concise (1-3 sentence) summary of what the page communicates. Not final copy.
field_definitions.required_sections: Array of section objects, each with name and purpose.
field_definitions.required_internal_links: Array of paths that must be linked from this page. All must exist in data/routes.json.
field_definitions.allowed_cta: Array of allowed call-to-action identifiers. Must match routes.json.
field_definitions.blocked_claims: Array of claim strings or patterns that are prohibited on this page.
field_definitions.editorial_notes: Internal notes about tone, approach, and content standards.
field_definitions.publication_blockers: Array of conditions that must be resolved before this page can be published.
